patches.find: — well below the extreme event that a ≥3% 500hPa anomaly in the 40–60°S band would require.
patches.replace: — indicating unremarkable Southern Annular Mode conditions. A ≥3% geopotential height anomaly in the 40–60°S band is an extreme event that did not occur.
patches.rationale: Curmudgeon Moderate #1: AAO is defined on 700hPa geopotential heights (not 500hPa), so directly equating +0.78σ AAO to the dome's 500hPa prediction target conflates two different physical quantities. Fix per curmudgeon option (a): report AAO as a SAM indicator, then separately assert the extreme event did not occur without sigma-to-percentage conversion.
